## What would this lab show?

_A sentence or two. What AWS services does it touch? What would someone learn or build?_

## Are you planning to build it?

- [ ] Yes, I'm planning to submit a PR
- [ ] Maybe, I'd like feedback first
- [ ] No, just leaving the idea here for someone else

## Any notes or prior art?

_Links, related repos, things you've already tried — totally optional._
